title: Kolte-Patil Developers is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Kolte-Patil Developers is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Kolte-Patil Developers has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Varanasi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Kolte-Patil Developers:
Kolte-Patil Developers is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kolte-Patil Developers!
